_comment: Alpha-Beta heuristic weights for FoW Chess — Agent 4: ABHeuristicAgent
_note: These weights are loaded by ABHeuristicAgent.java via buildFoWHeuristics(). Edit here and update the Java source to match.

_tuning_notes.centerControlWeight: Standard chess values; reduce to 0.05 if FoW makes center control less relevant
_tuning_notes.fogPenaltyWeight: Increase to 1.0 if agent plays too passively under fog; decrease to 0.2 if it over-avoids aggressive moves
_tuning_notes.kingSafetyWeight: Decrease to 0.5 for more aggressive king-side play; increase to 3.0 to maximize king hiding behavior

heuristics._fogPenaltyNote: Subtract 0.5 per enemy piece alive but not currently visible
heuristics._kingSafetyNote: Add 1.5 per adjacent square around own king hidden from enemy
